series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes the registration application (BMV 4349), the reporting form (BMV 4382), and all temporary tag information entered into the dealer system.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three years from date of section ODPS Record Center. ; Electronic: reported temporary tags in BMV dealer system three years from expiration date. Temporary tags issued a dealer with no record (not reported) in BMV dealer system three years from issue date of inventory
